fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location from which the items are being shipped.

fields.name: Assigned User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who is responsible for the document.

fields.name: Assignment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the user was assigned the activity.

fields.name: Assignment Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the user was assigned the activity.

fields.name: Sorting Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the method by which the shipments are sorted.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Contains the code for the number series that you selected for the program to use when it assigns a document number to a shipment header.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that someone has attached a comment to this warehouse shipment.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the zone on this shipment header.

fields.name: Document Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the progress level of warehouse handling on lines in the warehouse shipment.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies a posting date. If you enter a date, the posting date of the source documents is updated during posting.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the shipping agent who is transporting the items.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the service, such as a one-day delivery, that is offered by the shipping agent.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the delivery conditions of the related shipment, such as free on board (FOB). This value is not carried over from the source documents because one warehouse shipment can contain lines from many source documents. If you enter a code, the source document will be updated during posting. If this field is blank, the original shipment method of the source document is used.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipment date of the warehouse shipment. If you enter a date, the source document will be updated during posting. If this field is blank, the original shipment date of the source document is used.

fields.name: Completely Picked
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether all items on the warehouse shipment have been completely picked.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the shipment and is filled in by the program.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system. If you enter a value, the source document will be updated during posting. If this field is blank, the original document number is used.

fields.name: Create Posted Header
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally.

Specifies that a posted warehouse receipt is made when the receipt is posted.

fields.name: Shipping No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that is assigned from the shipment number series.

fields.name: Last Shipping No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last number that was assigned from the shipment number series.

fields.name: Shipping No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipment number series.
